examples: The complaints procedure is clumsy and time-consuming.
It's just very time consuming to get such a large quantity of data.
Going to court can be an expensive, time-consuming, and gut-wrenching experience that is best avoided.
Balloons can work but are time-consuming, and they are slaves to wind and pesky guide wires.
He has time for his career, golf and Twitter, but online dating is just too time-consuming.
